creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
> Maintainer of dns/nsd,
    
 > Please note that PR ports/170024 has just been submitted.

Yesterday I already send a PR for this problem, See
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=170001

Please use that instead.

	jaap
    
 >     If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 >     you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 >     and a committer will take care of it.
 >     
 >     The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >         http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/170024
 >     
 >     -- 
 >     Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
 >     edwin@FreeBSD.org
